patch.value: pm validate --fix-hints: machine-executable remediation commands per check
validate emits resolution remediation hints for one check only and not as a flag; agents must parse warning codes and build fix commands themselves.

--fix-hints adds fix_hints[] of executable pm commands per check (metadata->pm update --author stub, lifecycle->clear stale closure, history_drift->pm history-repair, command refs->corrected pm command); existing resolution hints aliased in; read-only (no mutation); --fix auto-apply explicitly out of scope.
validate emits resolution remediation hints for one check only and not as a flag; agents must parse warning codes and build fix commands themselves.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Cluster: agent self-repair via shared remediation registry (health --json remediation_map + validate --fix-hints + settings warning surfacing)

patch.value: Added read-only --fix-hints flag; each failing validate check gains details.fix_hints[] of executable pm commands. Resolution check aliases its per-row commands; other checks derive generic commands from the shared remediation registry. No item mutation.
validate emits executable fix commands per check behind a flag.
fix_hints[] present per failing check with --fix-hints; metadata/resolution/history_drift verified in sandbox.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: PR #111 bot round 1 (Codex P2, all valid): corrected remediation commands that did not actually resolve their findings. (1) validate_metadata_missing_author REMOVED — pm update --author is the audit author, no CLI flag writes metadata.author. (2) lifecycle_active_closure_like_metadata: --resolution "none" -> --unset resolution (explicit clear path per legacy-none-tokens.ts). (3) lifecycle_stale_blockers: --unblock-note -> --unset blocked-by --unset blocked-reason (the fields the validator actually inspects). (4) command_references_stale_pm_ids: --body -> --replace-tests --test (check scans tests[].command not body). (5) files_missing/orphaned: summary now covers pm docs duality (check spans item.files+item.docs). Also fixed doc/impl drift flagged by Sourcery+Gemini: RemediationEntry.code JSDoc said longest-prefix but resolver is first-match (codes disjoint). All re-verified executable in sandbox.
